title: Dressrosa Becomes the Target
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Trafalgar Law. The central beat is dressrosa becomes the target.
scene: The scene focuses on dressrosa becomes the target, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Trafalgar Law shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Without weapons, we'll lose the war!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Doflamingoo is out of the Shichibuka!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: New World: Kid Pirate Crew's Hideout

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: How did our alliance get leaked!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Doesn't matter who leaked it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But which one could it be!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It`s me.... I`ve resigned from the Shichibukai.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shhhhh!! shhhhhhh! He'll hear you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hello hello I'm monkey D. Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Like I just said, shut up!!

summary: Dressrosa Becomes the Target. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
